summary: Plan-only classification for five open inventory PRs. No security-sensitive hydrated items were present. No merge action is recommended because none of the open PRs has the complete merge preflight required by policy, especially passed Codex /review proof with addressed findings. One broad hook/product-surface PR needs maintainer judgment; the remaining narrow PRs should stay open as viable canonical candidates for their own scopes.

actions.reason: Keep as the canonical open PR for the gateway zombie-shutdown issue, but do not recommend merge without full merge preflight.
